mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO conversation_retrieval_task_hit ( retrieval_task_id, knowledge_base_id, file_id, chunk_id, chunk_index, score, rank_no, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.retrievalTaskId}, #{item.knowledgeBaseId}, #{item.fileId}, #{item.chunkId}, #{item.chunkIndex}, #{item.score}, #{item.rankNo}, #{item.createdAt} )
